name: Metrics Master Income Trust
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$1.9115. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.9098 where 7 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.9115, stop A$1.8760, target A$1.9350. Risk/reward is 0.66:1.
